mapper.select: SELECT I.INVITATION_ID , I.WS_ID , NULL AS WS_NM , I.INVITE_EMAIL , I.INVITE_TOKEN , I.AUTHORITY , I.STATUS , I.EXPIRE_DT , I.ACCEPTED_USER_ID , I.ACCEPTED_DT , I.REGIST_DT , I.REGIST_ID , NULL AS INVITER_NM FROM WORKSPACE_INVITATION I WHERE I.WS_ID = #{wsId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY I.REGIST_DT DESC

SELECT I.INVITATION_ID , I.WS_ID , W.WS_NM , I.INVITE_EMAIL , I.INVITE_TOKEN , I.AUTHORITY , I.STATUS , I.EXPIRE_DT , I.ACCEPTED_USER_ID , I.ACCEPTED_DT , I.REGIST_DT , I.REGIST_ID , U.USER_NM AS INVITER_NM FROM WORKSPACE_INVITATION I INNER JOIN WORKSPACE W ON W.ID = I.WS_ID LEFT JOIN SWC_USER U ON U.USER_ID = I.REGIST_ID WHERE I.INVITE_TOKEN = #{token, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
UPDATE WORKSPACE_INVITATION
SET STATUS = 'EXPIRED' WHERE WS_ID = #{wsId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND STATUS = 'PENDING' AND EXPIRE_DT < NOW()
